must_detect.matched_text: Material non‑public information (MNPI) means information a reasonable investor would deem important in deciding to trade LHHI securities and that is not yet available on the EDGE portal or via our current reports; examples include draft Q2 results, unannounced follow‑on offering on the Bayan Stock Exchange (BSE), or a signed but unannounced credit line with Isla Rural Bank.

Issuer‑relative materiality: operational updates at LHHI’s small logistics subsidiary (≤3% revenue) generally do not constitute MNPI unless the impact crosses internally set significance levels or alters our earnings guidance trajectory.
